$comment: List the BGG usernames whose collections should be baked into data/games.json. The GitHub Action reads this file. 'id' is a short internal key, 'label' is what shows in the UI. Set 'owned' to which BGG collection flags to include.

options.$comment: Which BGG collection subset to pull per user. own=1 is the usual choice. You can also flip on wishlist/preordered if you want.
